modals.deleteNoteGoal: Linked transactions will no longer be associated with this goal. The transactions will not be deleted.
modals.deleteNoteBudget: Linked transactions will no longer be associated with this budget. The transactions will not be deleted.
modals.deleteNoteLoan: Linked transactions will no longer be associated with this loan. They will lose their initial payment and repayment tags. The transactions will not be deleted.

permission.title: Permission Required
permission.description: We need access to your photos to set a profile picture.

confirmAll.modalDescription: All transactions awaiting confirmation will be confirmed. This cannot be undone.

updateDateOnConfirm.label: Update date on confirm
updateDateOnConfirm.description: Disable to retain original transaction date.

form.primaryAccountHint: This account will be used as the default account for new transactions and other actions.
form.archiveBannerText: Archiving an account hides it from everywhere except in reports. You can permanently delete the account with its associated transactions after archiving it.
form.archivedBannerText: This account is archived. Restore it to make changes.
form.archiveWarning: You can permanently delete the account with its transactions after you archive the account for safety measures.

deleteModal.title: Permanently delete {{name}}?
deleteModal.descriptionWithCount_one: This account has {{count}} transaction. Permanently deleting the account will also delete it. This action cannot be undone.
deleteModal.descriptionWithCount_other: This account has {{count}} transactions. Permanently deleting the account will also delete them. This action cannot be undone.
deleteModal.descriptionEmpty: Permanently deleting this account cannot be undone. This action is irreversible!

transactionStyle.title: Transaction Style

lessDense.label: Less dense layout

iconSource.label: Icon source

transactionStyle.info: Changes apply immediately to all transaction lists across the app.

buttonPlacement.title: Button Placement

buttonFeedback.label: Button Feedback
buttonFeedback.systemInfo: This depends on your phone's system settings. Make sure "Touch interactions" is enabled in Sound settings.

rtlReloadConfirm.title: Restart required
rtlReloadConfirm.description: Switching to this language requires a restart to apply the new text direction.

transactionLocation.title: Transaction Location
transactionLocation.footerCaption: When enabled, your current location can be attached to new transactions. You can still add or remove it manually on each transaction.

trash.title: Trash
trash.hint: Tap to open. Swipe left to delete permanently.

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.description: Automatically clear deleted items after a set period

modal.title: Empty Trash
modal.description: All items in the trash will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

toast.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

swipeInfo.title: Swipe Gestures
swipeInfo.description:
Swipe left to permanently delete a transaction.
Swipe right to restore it to your transactions.

pending.title: Pending Transactions
pending.body: View and manage your pending transactions. Review scheduled payments and transactions that are waiting to be processed.
pending.caption: Pending transactions will not be counted towards income, expenses, and account balance.

requireConfirmation.label: Require confirmation
requireConfirmation.description: When on, new planned transactions need your approval before they count. Existing transactions keep their original mode.

updateDateOnConfirm.label: Update date on confirm
updateDateOnConfirm.description: Disable to retain original transaction date.

notify.label: Notify me
notify.description: Schedule a reminder when a planned transaction is due.

detail.pendingNotice: Pending transactions are not included in progress

deleteModal.title: Permanently delete {{name}}?

deleteModal.descriptionWithCount_other: This tag is used by {{count}} transactions. Permanently deleting the tag will unlink it from all of them and remove it permanently. This cannot be undone.

locationPermission.warning: Location permission required to use current location

contactPermission.deniedDescription: We need contacts permission to select a contact from your phone.

info.title: How It Works
info.description: Add items to your bill, assign participants, and split costs. When you're done, generate loan transactions for each person who owes you.

empty.title: No Items
empty.description: Tap the + button to add an item to split.

item.name: Item Name
item.quantityDescription: Multiplied to every item, useful for tax

empty.title: No Participants
empty.description: Add people to split the bill with.

summary.title: Summary
summary.name: Name
summary.noPayer: Please select who you are first.
summary.noItems: Add items and participants to see the summary.

whoAreYou.title: Who Are You?
whoAreYou.description: Select yourself to see who owes you money.

confirm.title: Clear Bill?
confirm.description: This will remove all items and reset the bill. Participants will be kept.

exchangeRates.title: Exchange Rates
exchangeRates.instructionCaption: Select an entry to set a custom exchange rate. Note: All exchange rate calculations use USD as a reference.

infoModal.title: Exchange Rates
infoModal.description: Rates are shown as amount per 1 USD. Select an entry to set a custom rate. All calculations use USD as reference.

errors.invalidCurrencyCode: Invalid currency code. Please use a valid ISO 4217 currency code.

errors.invalidData: Invalid exchange rate data. Please try again later.
errors.usingCachedRates: Using cached exchange rates. Rates may be outdated.
errors.rateNotFound: Exchange rate not found. Please try again or set a custom rate in Settings.
